headlines.headline: NBA betting tips, DFS picks for Tuesday: Will the Thunder respond in Game 5?
headlines.description: Eric Moody breaks down Tuesday's Thunder-Spurs playoff game and offers his favorite bets and DFS plays.

headlines.headline: Mad Dog: 'I’d be shocked if LeBron goes back to Cleveland'
headlines.description: Chris “Mad Dog” Russo joins “The Rich Eisen Show” to discuss what's next for the Cavaliers after getting swept by the Knicks.

headlines.headline: NBA championship, Finals MVP odds: Knicks close out Cavs, OKC still title fave going into key Game 5
headlines.description: The Thunder and Spurs continue their battle in a critical Game 5, and the Knicks are headed the NBA Finals, where they have the second-shortest title odds.

headlines.headline: Victor Wembanyama card sells for $5.11 million in private sale
headlines.description: Victor Wembanyama's 1-of-1 numbered 2023-24 Panini Prizm Black parallel has sold for $5.11 million in a private sale via Fanatics Collect, Fanatics confirmed to ESPN.

headlines.headline: Stephen A.: Chet Holmgren looks defeated
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith weighs in on what he has seen from Chet Holmgren ahead of the Thunder's matchup vs. the Spurs in Game 5.

headlines.headline: Stephen A. can't contain his excitement over Knicks' title chances
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith breaks down the Knicks' title chances after sweeping the Cavaliers in the Eastern Conference finals.

headlines.headline: Supreme Court won't intervene in Brian Flores' suit vs. NFL
headlines.description: The Supreme Court refused to intervene in a discrimination lawsuit led by former Dolphins coach Brian Flores against the NFL, allowing the case to proceed toward trial. The NFL had hoped to handle the case through its own arbitration process.

headlines.headline: Manny Fernandez, star on 1972 undefeated Dolphins, dies at 79
headlines.description: Manny Fernandez, a two-time Super Bowl-winning defensive lineman with the Dolphins, has died at age 79.

headlines.headline: 2027 NFL draft quarterback class: Top prospects to know
headlines.description: Next year's QB draft class should be loaded, with big names such as Arch Manning, Dante Moore, CJ Carr and Trinidad Chambliss. Here's what you need to know.

headlines.headline: Raiders to put 'a lot' of pressure on Ashton Jeanty in Year 2
headlines.description: If Klint Kubiak's offense is going to function properly, it will need more out of the star running back.

headlines.headline: Titans say OSU's Carnell Tate was perfect fit for Cam Ward
headlines.description: With premium defensive options on the board, Tennessee made unanimous decision to get an impact player on offense.

headlines.headline: Field Yates' fantasy football PPR rankings: Top 160 for 2026
headlines.description: Field provides his latest rankings for the upcoming season, which will be updated throughout the offseason.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup odds: Carolina Hurricanes odds-on favorites over Vegas Golden Knights for Final
headlines.description: The Hurricanes remain the Stanley Cup favorites, with the Golden Knights just behind on the odds board.

headlines.headline: Where P.K. Subban says the Canadiens have to improve
headlines.description: P.K. Subban details what the Canadiens have to do moving forward after falling behind in the series against the Hurricanes.

headlines.headline: How Toronto feels about Mitch Marner, potential playoff MVP
headlines.description: After an up-and-down postseason record with the Leafs, Marner is leading all playoff scorers for a team one win away from the Cup Final.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup playoff trendspotting: More chaos, young stars, more
headlines.description: Midway through the conference finals, here's what has stuck out in the analytics.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Previews, stats, schedule, bracket

headlines.description: Carolina Hurricanes (53-22-7, in the Metropolitan Division) vs. Montreal Canadiens (48-24-10, in the Atlantic Division)
